hero.title: Modern hotel spa management,
hero.subtitle: Unified schedule, room charge payment, therapist app, frictionless client booking. One platform to elevate your hotel's spa experience.

problem.title: Your hotel's spa deserves better
problem.subtitle: Legacy software is slow, complex and doesn't talk to your PMS. Your teams waste time, your guests wait.

fragmented.title: Fragmented tools
fragmented.desc: Paper agenda, Excel for therapists, another sheet for billing.

slow.title: Slow confirmation
slow.desc: 24h to confirm a booking. Clients drop off.

noPms.title: No room charge
noPms.desc: Treatments don't automatically land on the room bill.

features.title: Everything your spa needs, in one platform
features.subtitle: Designed with directors of 4 and 5-star hotel spas.

pms.title: Native PMS integration
pms.desc: Opera Cloud & Mews. Automatic room charge, real-time guest data sync.

agenda.title: Unified multi-site schedule
agenda.desc: All your spas, treatment rooms and therapists in a single view.

pwa.title: Therapist mobile app
pwa.desc: Push notifications, in-session add-ons, automatic Stripe Connect payouts.

booking.title: Frictionless client booking
booking.desc: In-room QR code, no-login flow, confirmation in under 10 minutes.

billing.title: Automatic billing
billing.desc: Therapist commissions, monthly hotel invoices, daily reports generated automatically.

giftcards.title: Gift cards & bundles
giftcards.desc: Create and sell gift cards, treatment bundles and seasonal offers in a few clicks.

howItWorks.title: From signup to first bookings in 2 weeks
howItWorks.subtitle: Guided onboarding, zero friction for your teams.

step1.title: Connect your PMS
step1.desc: Our team sets up the Opera Cloud or Mews integration. Your rooms and guest data are synced.

step2.title: Train your teams
step2.desc: Training sessions for concierges, spa directors and therapists. Guides and unlimited support included.

step3.title: Launch bookings
step3.desc: QR codes in rooms, online booking, therapist app deployed. Your clients book in 2 clicks.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, aligned with your business
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Pay per location, scale as you grow.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For a single spa, boutique hotel or independent day spa.

features.booking: Online client booking + in-room QR code

starter.note: 14-day free trial. No commitment, no credit card.

custom.name: Custom
custom.tagline: For hotel chains, groups and tailored requirements.

pricing.footnote: All prices in EUR excl. VAT. Volume discount above 5 locations.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your spa?
cta.subtitle: Book a personalized 30-minute demo with our team. We'll show the platform with your treatments and organization.

footer.tagline: Saoma — the spa management platform for hotels & day spas.
